title: Strengthen read-only apply preview with repository path audit
summary: Deepen the native proposal apply-preview loop by resolving current repository file candidates from proposal evidence and surfacing a truthful repository path audit without mutating source truth.
acceptance_criteria: Selected proposal artifact detail shows a repository path audit in the read-only apply preview.
The audit resolves current scope source files and evidence-derived path candidates against the current checkout.
The UI clearly distinguishes present and missing repository candidates without implying any source mutation.
The macOS build still passes after the audit enhancement.
Patch hygiene and ticket validation pass for the slice.

evidence.note: Patch hygiene passed after adding repository path audit details to the read-only apply preview.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
evidence.note: Native macOS build succeeded after adding repository path audit mapping and localized apply-preview labels.

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 follow-up to strengthen read-only apply preview against current repository files.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: This slice remains read-only and only audits current repository candidates derived from proposal scope and evidence metadata.
Repository path audit should stay truthful even when candidates are missing or incomplete.
